studyName: Sequence Analysis of Mutations and Translocations Across Breast Cancer Subtypes

variables.description: Country where sample was collected

variables.description: Evidence of estrogen receptor expression on immunohistochemistry

variables.name: Expression Subtype

variables.name: Grade
variables.description: Degree of tumor differentiation as determined by pathology

variables.description: Subtype as determined by pathology

variables.description: The main disease(s) for which the participant has been asked to donate a sample for study

variables.name: Stage

variables.description: Indicates the Tumor / Normal status of a sample

variables.name: SAMPID

variables.name: SAMPLE_USE
variables.description: Sample use. SNP_Array: SNP genotypes obtained using standard or custom microarrays; WES_SRA: Whole exome sequencing data available through SRA; WGS_SRA: Whole genome sequencing data available through SRA; mRNA_Expression: Expression data for mRNA sample
